# Vendored dependencies

These browser bundles are served from the same origin as the application to avoid runtime execution of CDN-hosted scripts.

`checksums.sha256` records the SHA-256 hash of each vendored file. Run `npm run verify:vendor` after updating these files.

| File | Source | Version | SHA-256 | SHA-384 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `peerjs.min.js` | `https://unpkg.com/peerjs@1.5.5/dist/peerjs.min.js` | 1.5.5 | `7604d8c31bec4f134b0d15c2d80b1d095ea18af005354f439f14291fcd7b4168` | `x0YgkOr/3UOZP2CRDxGW9e0Q+2Qjyr3uJrm4xU32Y7ZCNAo7Cc7bjhrZMi/dwczu` |
| `qrcode.min.js` | `https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/qrcodejs/1.0.0/qrcode.min.js` | 1.0.0 | `c541ef06327885a8415bca8df6071e14189b4855336def4f36db54bde8484f36` | `3zSEDfvllQohrq0PHL1fOXJuC/jSOO34H46t6UQfobFOmxE5BpjjaIJY5F2/bMnU` |
